title: Kuriboh's Family Server Pack
description: A lightweight Minecraft modpack designed for world decoration, with just the right tools to automate almost anything you want. It includes plenty of multiplayer quality-of-life mods for a smooth experience, plus my personal favorite a camera mod!
body:
A Lightweight Minecraft Modpack for Builders and Automation Enthusiasts

This modpack is designed to be lightweight while enhancing world decoration, giving you the perfect balance between creativity and functionality. It includes just enough tools to automate almost anything, so you can focus on designing your world without tedious manual labor.

Key Features:

🏡 World Decoration: A variety of mods to bring your builds to life.

🔧 Full Automation: Utilize Modular Routers and Integrated Dynamics for advanced automation.

📸 Capture the Moment: A camera mod to create the ultimate in-game photo album.

🏕️ Safe Housing: Magnum Torch prevents unwanted mobs near your base.

🔥 Shader Support: Enhance visuals with full shader compatibility.

🛠️ Custom Tools: Silent Gear lets you craft the best tools tailored to your playstyle.

🎮 Multiplayer QoL Mods:

In-game pinging for better communication on servers.
Visual Workbench for seamless multiplayer crafting.

With a focus on immersion, automation, and creative freedom, this modpack is perfect for builders and tech enthusiasts alike.
